title: Linköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Linköping with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Linköping are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with heating degree days (HDD) at 13.2 GG and no cooling degree days (CDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 78% and the wind speed is moderate at 8.3 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
